calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A.'S Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Default Judgment: DENIED for failure to comply with CCP 1005(b). The motion was served by mail on March 19, 2004 (2 days short of the required 26 days' notice). Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice On Non-Appearance ; Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-09-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
